name: Land It
short_description: Do you think you could land an airplane? Even on an aircraft carrier? Land It lets you prove your skills with three different modes: land on a carrier to show off your precision, play with friends and dodge missiles, or take control of an airliner to make the smoothest landing anyone's ever seen!
detailed_description:
Do you think you could land an airplane? Land It lets you find out in three different scenarios:

CARRIER MODE

Fly a fighter jet and land on an aircraft carrier! Deal with short runways, waves, and darkness! Can you avoid falling off the edge?

PROFFESIONAL MODE

Smooth landings not only make passengers more comfortable, but they prove the skill of the pilot. You're not interested in that. You don't have money to do regular maintenance on your airplane, so just try really hard to not break it. How many times can you land before your plane finally falls apart?

MULTIPLAYER MODE

If carrier mode is too easy for you, multiplayer mode lets you attempt a carrier landing while up to three other players try to shoot you down. Can you land before you get hit?

To help you in these modes, there are four bonus you can earn by landing in them:

UPGRADES

Stopping your plane in a red box will grant you a random upgrade! With nine possibilities, anything can happen. You might get better engines, improved brakes, or even reduced gravity!

REPAIR

In professional mode, blue boxes will give you a free repair! stopping in these boxes gives you a bit more health so you can keep flying!

SCORE BOOST

professional mode also contains score boosts, yellow boxes that give you 50 points for stopping in them!

ARRESTING WIRE

In carrier and multiplayer mode, arresting wires are the white boxes found on the back of the carrier. Touching down in this box stops your plane almost immediately, giving you more points!

LIVERIES

Unlock new paint jobs for your planes! Some achievements will unlock a new livery that you can equip and use in every mode! These liveries can change the airline, color, and sometimes even the model of airplane! There are currently more than 50 liveries to choose from!

POINTS

Earn points with each landing. Use these to buy more lives, more types of upgrades, and other perks that last between rounds!
